expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: result.md cites Phase 3 requirements explicitly: from skill_snapshot/SKILL.md policy statement “report-editor deep research must run `tavily-search` first and use `confluence` only as a recorded fallback”, and reference.md encodes `task.json.deep_research_policy = tavily_first_confluence_second` plus a rule that “`tavily-search` must run before any `confluence` fallback and the fallback reason must be recorded.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
expectations.evidence: result.md asserts and supports that the ordering requirement is embedded in Phase 3 work and Phase 3 --post validation gate (quotes: Phase 3 “spawn Tavily-first deep-research requests …” and Phase 3 --post “validate … Tavily-first research artifacts, optional Confluence fallback ordering …”), and references Phase 3 artifacts/gates from reference.md.
